query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `royalty_collaborators` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`artistName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`role` enum('artist','producer','songwriter','engineer','featured','session_musician','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'artist',
	`splitPercentage` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`email` varchar(320),
	`isRegistered` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`inviteStatus` enum('pending','accepted','declined') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `royalty_collaborators_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `royalty_projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
	FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);
